## Week in Review: 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-19

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 8.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.4 (+13.3% WoW), sentiment: negative (-0.11)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.9 (+42.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.25)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 8.7 (+29.8% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.23)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
